meaning_cn: 行啊你 / 你真行（可褒可贬，看语气）
trap_check: 真正意思：随语境变化——真心夸奖 or 阴阳怪气

examples.en: "I got the promotion!" "Wow, good for you!"

examples.source: The Office US S3E12 · 办公室
examples.en: "I'm taking a mental health day." "Good for you, Dwight."
examples.cn: 「我今天请个心理健康假。」「行啊你，Dwight。」

examples.en: "I decided to become a vegetarian." "Good for you. Pass the steak."
examples.cn: 「我决定吃素了。」「你真行。牛排递我一下。」
